title: Notation Ordering Gap Test Fixture

## Abstract

We prove convergence of an iterative algorithm for a class of nonlinear operators.

## Introduction

The manuscript establishes conditions under which the sequence converges.

## Proof

Theorem 1: Let $T$ be a contraction mapping on a complete metric space $(X, d)$.
Then $T$ has a unique fixed point.

Lemma 1: The operator $\phi$ satisfies the Lipschitz condition with constant $L < 1$.

## Notation

Let $X$ denote a complete metric space. Let $d$ denote the metric on $X$.
Let $T$ denote the operator of interest. Let $L$ denote the Lipschitz constant.

## Conclusion

The result establishes convergence under standard assumptions.
